name: 2025 The Hague NATO Summit
summary: Leaders of the NATO alliance met in The Hague to reaffirm commitments and set new defence-spending targets, marking a key moment in transatlantic security policy. The summit underscored the ongoing strategic pivot in Europe amid shifting global power dynamics. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

name: 2025 Kamchatka Peninsula Megathrust Earthquake
location: Off the east coast of the Kamchatka Peninsula, Russia
summary: A magnitude ~8.8 megathrust earthquake struck off Russia’s far-eastern Kamchatka region, one of the strongest quakes recorded in recent decades. Though damage was moderate relative to magnitude, it triggered tsunami alarms across the Pacific and highlighted seismic risk in the ‘Ring of Fire’. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

name: 2025 30th UN Climate Change Conference (COP 30)
summary: The COP 30 climate summit brought together governments, scientists and activists to negotiate next-phase global climate policy, focusing on mitigation, adaptation and loss & damage frameworks. Held in Belém, it emphasised the Amazon and tropical ecosystems in climate diplomacy. :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}

name: 2025 South Africa Eastern Cape Floods
summary: Severe torrential rains and floods in South Africa’s Eastern Cape region killed over 100 people and displaced thousands, marking one of the country’s worst climate-driven disasters in recent years. The event underscored the growing human cost of extreme weather in a changing climate. :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}

name: 2025 Italy General Strikes & Protests for Gaza
summary: Massive nationwide general strikes and protests erupted across Italy as hundreds of thousands mobilised against the country’s arms shipments to Israel and its stance in the Gaza war. The events signified a major moment of civil mobilisation and labour activism in Europe. :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6}
